rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly identified and addressed multiple logical inconsistencies, providing specific fixes.
rationale.R1.3: The agent comprehensively audited claims against evidence, ensuring each was supported.
rationale.R1.6: The output reflects a careful copy-edit with consistent improvements.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty was clearly marked for each recommendation with appropriate disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The response stayed strictly within the agreed scope without deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; potential harms were identified in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: While some changes were traced, not all edits were annotated with sources or reasons.
